label: Complex curve
description: A Unity AnimationCurve wrapper that serializes as a list of keyframes plus optional wrap modes. Used by CurveKeyAnimationPart for the angle channel and by Vector3Curve for each axis.

keyframes.label: Keyframes
keyframes.description: List of keyframe control points defining the curve.

preWrapMode.label: Pre wrap mode
preWrapMode.description: How the curve extrapolates before the first keyframe. Default is ClampForever.

postWrapMode.label: Post wrap mode
postWrapMode.description: How the curve extrapolates after the last keyframe. Default is ClampForever.
